ATTACK.description: This enemy intends to [gold]Attack[/gold] {IsMultiplayer:everyone |}for [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage{Repeat:plural:| [blue]{}[/blue] times}.
ATTACK.title: Aggressive
BUFF.description: This enemy intends to use a [gold]Buff[/gold].
BUFF.title: Empower
CARD_DEBUFF.description: This enemy intends to apply [gold]Afflictions[/gold] on your cards.
CARD_DEBUFF.title: Malicious
DEATH_BLOW.description: This creature is trying to take you down with it. It will attack you for [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage before being destroyed.
DEATH_BLOW.title: Death Blow
DEBUFF.description: This enemy intends to apply a [gold]Debuff[/gold] to you.
DEBUFF.title: Strategic
DEBUFF_STRONG.description: This enemy intends to apply a powerful [gold]Debuff[/gold] to you.

DEFEND.description: This enemy intends to [gold]Block[/gold] on its turn.
DEFEND.title: Defensive
ESCAPE.title: Cowardly
HEAL.title: Heal
SLEEP.description: This enemy is doing nothing this turn.
SLEEP.title: Sleeping
STATUS.description: This enemy intends to give you [blue]{CardCount}[/blue] [gold]Status[/gold] {CardCount:plural:card|cards}.

STUN.description: This enemy can't act on its next turn.
STUN.title: Stunned
SUMMON.title: Summon
